title: dot-agents verification result
description: Canonical document for `.agents/active/verification/<task_id>/<verifier_type>.result.yaml`, where `<verifier_type>` is the filename stem before `.result.yaml` (for example `merge-back.result.yaml` → `verifier_type` = `merge-back`). Consumed by verifier roles in later plan phases and by review ingestion.

schema_version.description: Increment when adding required fields or breaking semantics.

task_id.description: Plan task this verification run belongs to.

verifier_type.description: Stable verifier slug (filename stem). Examples: merge-back, unit, api, ui, batch, streaming, review, custom.

summary.description: Human-readable verification narrative (evidence, commands, or delegate-reported outcome).

recorded_at.description: RFC3339 / RFC3339Nano timestamp when this result was recorded.

delegation_id.description: Optional delegation contract / bundle id when this result is tied to a fanout.

commands.description: Commands executed during verification (for example go test, curl).

artifact_paths.description: Repo-relative paths to evidence artifacts (logs, screenshots, diffs).
